Sport|Football

The draw for the 2024Paris Olympicshas been made for both the men’s and women’s tournaments.

Emma Hayeswill lead theUSAout at her first international tournament against Germany, Australia and one of Zambia and Morocco in Group B.

Team GB did not qualify and Group C pits World Cup winners Spain against Brazil.

In the men’s game, hosts France have been drawn against the USA, either South Africa, Nigeria, Zambia or Guinea and New Zealand.

Women’sOlympic FootballTournament

Group A: France, Colombia, Canada, New Zealand

Group B: USA, CAF 2 (Zambia or Morocco), Germany, Australia

Group C: Spain, Japan, CAF 1 (Nigeria or Morocco), Brazil

Men’s Olympic Football Tournament

Group A: France, USA, AFC 4 or Guinea, New Zealand

Group B: Argentina, Morocco, AFC 3, Ukraine

Group C:AFC 2, Spain, Egypt, Dominican Republic

Group D: AFC 1, Paraguay, Mali, Israel

Group games for both tournaments begin on Wednesday July 24, 2024.

The men’s final is scheduled for Friday August 9 and the women’s for Saturday August 10.

author: Jonathan Gorrie
keywords: Paris Olympics, Emma Hayes, USA, olympic football
